news.title:
Labour unrest in Noida affects auto, electronics, and garment sectors, raising concerns over wage hikes and operational risks.
Key impacted stocks include Motherson, Maruti Suzuki, Dixon, BEL, Asian Paints, and Dabur, though no major operational hits reported yet.
news.summary:
Labour unrest in Noida affects auto, electronics, and garment sectors, raising concerns over wage hikes and operational risks.
Key impacted stocks include Motherson, Maruti Suzuki, Dixon, BEL, Asian Paints, and Dabur, though no major operational hits reported yet.

news.title:
Asian Paints Ltd rose 7.9% to ₹2,359.4 from ₹2,185.85 between April 6-10, 2026.
Its growth outpaced Sensex's 5.3%, driven by price swings, ratings, and options activity.
news.summary:
Asian Paints Ltd rose 7.9% to ₹2,359.4 from ₹2,185.85 between April 6-10, 2026.
Its growth outpaced Sensex's 5.3%, driven by price swings, ratings, and options activity.

news.title:
Berger Paints announced a 5-10% price hike effective April 9, following Asian Paints' 6-8% hike.
Rising crude-linked input costs drive hikes; sector faces margin pressures amid global energy volatility.
news.summary:
Berger Paints announced a 5-10% price hike effective April 9, following Asian Paints' 6-8% hike.

news.title:
Asian Paints announces amalgamation of subsidiaries Nova and Harind for operational efficiency.
The merger won't materially impact financials; no cash consideration involved as Nova is wholly owned by Harind.

news.title:

Competitors like Asian Paints & JSW Dulux also raise prices; dealers stock up, aiding short-term volumes.
